tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Lately, I've been thinking something's going wrong[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]
'Cause you got an attitude[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And you're not in the mood like you used to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Girl, I can feel it when I hold you in my arms[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm7[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]
The feeling is not the same[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Can I be the one to blame?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to lose your love, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to say bye-bye, oh no no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
True love is so hard to find[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
And it's right between your lips and mine, and mine[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Before I let you go away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Can I get a kiss goodnight?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Before I let you go away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Can I get a kiss goodnight?[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Turn the lights down low, let's take it nice and slow[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]
My mission is to keep you mine[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Don't want this to be the last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
We make sweet love Baby, I know you feel it, too[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Fm7[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]
It's bigger than the both of us[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
There's one thing I'm so certain of[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to lose your love, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I don't want to say no no bye-bye[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fm7[/ch]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
It's always the little things, I remember[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And I can't just let it slip away, Slip away[/tab]


[Chorus]
Pre Chorus:
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to lose your love, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
I don't want to say bye-bye, oh no no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
True love is so hard to find[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
And it's right between your lips and mine, and mine[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want lose your sweet love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]
So don't say good-bye, say good-night[/tab]
